title: E2E: Dev cycle — FizzBuzz with tests and validation loop
body: Write a Python module fizzbuzz.py with a function fizzbuzz(n) that returns 'Fizz' for multiples of 3, 'Buzz' for multiples of 5, 'FizzBuzz' for both, and str(n) otherwise. Also write test_fizzbuzz.py with pytest tests covering all cases. Both files go in the working directory.

cycle.prompt: Plan the implementation. List the exact files to create, functions to write, and test cases to cover. Be specific.
Implement the plan from the previous step. Write all files to disk using the Write tool. Do NOT over-engineer.
Fix the validation errors shown below. Read the error output carefully and make the minimum change needed.
